meta.description: Agenda directive definitions for the Imperial Senate voting phase (TI4-inspired)

martial-law.name: Martial Law
martial-law.flavorText: The Imperial governor declares martial law. Garrison troops are on high alert.

open-trade-routes.name: Open Trade Routes
open-trade-routes.description: Heroes start the next mission with an extra stim pack.
open-trade-routes.flavorText: Trade lanes are opened, allowing supplies to flow to resistance cells.

imperial-requisition.name: Imperial Requisition
imperial-requisition.description: Imperial threat per round increases by 1.
imperial-requisition.flavorText: The Empire redirects resources to this sector, increasing military presence.

black-market-access.name: Black Market Access
black-market-access.flavorText: Smugglers open their channels, offering discounted goods to the resistance.

intelligence-windfall.name: Intelligence Windfall
intelligence-windfall.description: Gain +3 bonus XP from the next mission.
intelligence-windfall.flavorText: A sympathetic Imperial officer leaks training data, accelerating skill development.

propaganda-broadcast.name: Propaganda Broadcast
propaganda-broadcast.description: Operatives start with +1 morale. Imperials start with +1 morale.
propaganda-broadcast.flavorText: Both sides broadcast rallying messages, boosting the resolve of their troops.

sector-lockdown.name: Sector Lockdown
sector-lockdown.description: Fewer exploration tokens appear on the next map.
sector-lockdown.flavorText: Imperial security patrols sweep the area, clearing hidden caches.

resistance-network.name: Resistance Network
resistance-network.description: More exploration tokens appear on the next map.
resistance-network.flavorText: Resistance operatives seed the area with supply drops and intel packages.

tactical-briefing.name: Tactical Briefing
tactical-briefing.description: Gain +1 command token per round in the next mission.
tactical-briefing.flavorText: A veteran commander provides tactical briefings, improving battlefield coordination.

garrison-reinforcement.name: Garrison Reinforcement
garrison-reinforcement.description: Imperial reinforcements arrive 1 round later, but threat per round +1.
garrison-reinforcement.flavorText: The garrison consolidates forces, delaying deployment but increasing overall strength.

humanitarian-aid.name: Humanitarian Aid
humanitarian-aid.description: Heroes start with 2 extra stim packs and +2 morale.
humanitarian-aid.flavorText: Medical supplies and relief workers arrive, bolstering resistance morale and readiness.

imperial-crackdown.name: Imperial Crackdown
imperial-crackdown.description: Imperial threat per round +2. Operatives lose 1 starting morale.
imperial-crackdown.flavorText: The Empire tightens its grip, flooding the sector with troops and spreading fear.
